hero.welcome_md:
A recurring Sunday-morning ecstatic-dance room at the historic **Avalon Ballroom** in Boulder, Colorado. Co-hosted by [Bloomurian](/people/bloomurian) (Robin Liepman), [Aly Constantine](/people/aly-constantine), and Danny. The embodied-community substrate beneath the larger Ocean Bloom configuration of conscious-music gatherings.

*The room where the Boulder cluster (Aly, Bloomurian, and others) gathered weekly long before any of them appeared in this network's graph. Door rhythms drift with the seasons; verify the current schedule on the host's channels.*

facts.label: When
facts.value_md: Sunday mornings. Specific times shift with the seasons.

facts.label: Field
facts.value_md: Improvised conscious dance · drug-and-alcohol-free · open floor.

articles.body_md: The Boulder cluster — Bloomurian, Aly Constantine, Poranguí's festival circuit through Colorado, Matías De Stefano at the Emersion Conference at GaiaSphere, the PORTAL late-night shows at Meow Wolf Denver, the MAPS Psychedelic Science gatherings, the Ocean Bloom 2024 configuration — overlaps heavily on shared rooms. Boulder Ecstatic Dance on Sunday morning is one of the recurring threads. Cells in the cluster show up on the floor week after week; visiting artists and teachers move through; the floor stays. The relationship with Aly threads the cluster from outside-observation into inside-knowing in this body's awareness.
articles.heading: Where the Boulder cluster gathers

articles.body_md:
- The embodied-community substrate beneath the Boulder cluster — many of the body's Colorado-based cells ([Bloomurian](/people/bloomurian), [Aly Constantine](/people/aly-constantine), and others) meet here on a weekly rhythm.
- The same Gabrielle-Roth-wave lineage that grounds [Rhythm Sanctuary](/people/rhythm-sanctuary) (Wheat Ridge) and [5Rhythms Ubud](/people/5rhythms-ubud) — three Colorado-and-Bali rooms holding the same substrate practice.
- Sunday-morning rhythm as substrate-teaching: the steady tend of one floor over years is more substantial than any single event. Pairs with [lc-tending-over-producing](/vision/lc-tending-over-producing).
articles.heading: What Boulder Ecstatic Dance has given the Coherence Network

note_from_body.body_md: Boulder Ecstatic Dance is a working community room with its own ongoing tending by the host team. This page recognises the floor's role in the body's Boulder cluster.
